mapper.select: SELECT s.sal_id AS salId, s.emp_id AS empId, e.emp_name AS empName, d.dep_name AS deptName, s.sal_month AS salMonth, s.sal_total AS totalPay, s.sal_ded_total AS totalDeductions, s.sal_net_pay AS netPay, s.sal_pay_date AS payDate FROM EMP_SALARY s JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON s.emp_id = e.emp_id JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON e.dep_id = d.dep_id WHERE s.sal_id = #{salId}

SELECT d.item_id AS itemId, i.item_name AS itemName, i.item_type AS itemType, d.amount AS amount FROM EMP_SALARY_DETAIL d JOIN SALARY_ITEM i ON d.item_id = i.item_id WHERE d.sal_id = #{salId} ORDER BY CASE i.item_type WHEN 'P' THEN 1 WHEN 'D' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, i.item_id
SELECT emp_id AS empId, emp_name AS empName, pos_id AS posId FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE emp_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR emp_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS workDays, SUM(work_hours) AS workHours, SUM(night_work_hour) AS nightHours, SUM(holiday_work_hour) AS holidayHours FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE emp_id = #{empId} AND DATE_FORMAT(work_date, '%Y%m') = #{salMonth}
SELECT p.pos_allow FROM EMPLOYEE e JOIN POSITION p ON e.pos_id = p.pos_id WHERE e.emp_id = #{empId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EMP_SALARY ( sal_id, emp_id, sal_month, sal_total, sal_ded_total, sal_net_pay, sal_pay_date, sal_register ) VALUES ( #{dto.salId}, #{dto.empId}, #{dto.salMonth}, #{dto.totalPay}, #{dto.totalDeductions}, #{dto.netPay}, NOW(), #{dto.register} )
mapper.select: SELECT e.emp_id AS empId, e.emp_name AS empName, d.dep_name AS deptName FROM EMPLOYEE e JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON e.dep_id = d.dep_id WHERE e.emp_id = #{empId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMP_SALARY WHERE sal_id = #{salId}
